HGSS.537.0000:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You’re finally awake.\r
Your friend Lyra was just here.\f
She was playing hide-and-seek with
her MARILL.\f
Oh, I almost forgot! Our acquaintance,
Professor Elm, was looking for you.\f
He said he had a favor to ask of you.\f
You know where the lab is, right?
It’s right next door to us.\f
By the way, do you have everything
you need to go out?\r
Here, use this Bag to carry things...\f
HGSS.537.0001:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You’re finally awake.\r
Your friend Ethan was just here.\f
He was playing hide-and-seek with
his MARILL.\f
Oh, I almost forgot! Our acquaintance,
Professor Elm, was looking for you.\f
He said he had a favor to ask of you.\f
You know where the lab is, right?
It’s right next door to us.\f
By the way, do you have everything
you need to go out?\r
Here, use this Bag to carry things...\f
HGSS.537.0003:
Here you can save a record of
your progress...\f
HGSS.537.0005:
Just try touching the buttons, and
you’ll know what to do in no time.\f
HGSS.537.0006:
Professor Elm has been waiting for
you, dear. Please, go and help him.
HGSS.537.0007:
Oh! [0103,0000,0000]!
That’s a cute Pokémon you have.\f
Professor Elm must have given it
to you?\f
Oh, Professor Elm has a task for you,
you say?\r
What kind of task?\f
...\f
I see. That sounds a little difficult.\f
But when someone makes that kind of
request of you, it must be important!\f
Oh, that’s right!
I completely forgot!\f
Your Pokégear came back from the
repair shop!\f
Here you go!\f
HGSS.537.0009:
The Pokémon Gear...
or Pokégear, as it’s often called,\r
is what every Trainer should have.\f
HGSS.537.0010:
Guess what?
You can use the Pokégear to make a\r
phone call, too.\r
Do you remember how? [0200,0000]
HGSS.537.0011:
Just power on the Pokégear and
touch the telephone button, OK?\f
HGSS.537.0012:
Select the POKéGEAR button on the
Touch Screen. Then select the\r
telephone button.\f
HGSS.537.0013:
The names of the people you can call
are automatically registered.\f
Just select one to give him or her
a call.\f
Wow, I can’t believe it’s so easy
to make a phone call!
HGSS.537.0014:
What’s wrong?\f
Did you forget how to get to
Mr. Pokémon’s house?\f
Go north on Route 30.
Take care, dear.
HGSS.537.0015:
...
So, you’re leaving on an adventure...\f
OK! I’ll help, too.
But what can I do for you?\f
I know!
Every time you receive prize money,\r
I’ll save some of it for you.\f
On a long journey, money’s important.\f
Do you want me to save
your money for you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.537.0016:
I want to support you on your
adventure, [0103,0000,0000].\r
OK! I’ll help, too.\r
But what can I do for you?\f
I know!\f
Every time you receive prize money,
I’ll save some of it for you.\f
On a long journey, money’s important.
Do you want me to save\r
your money for you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.537.0017:
OK, I’ll take care of your money.\f
Be careful.\f
Pokémon are your friends.
When you work as a team,\r
you can accomplish anything!\r
Now, go on!
HGSS.537.0018:
OK, but be careful out there.\f
Pokémon are your friends.
When you work as a team,\r
you can accomplish anything!\r
Now, go on!
HGSS.537.0019:
[0103,0000,0000], stand firm!
I’m always there for you!
HGSS.537.0020:
Hi! Welcome home!
You’re doing fine, I see.\f
I’ve kept your room tidy and clean.
Or...\r
Is this about your money? [0200,0000]
HGSS.537.0022:
Oh!
You have no money saved.
HGSS.537.0023:
Your money’s safe here!
Take care of yourself!
HGSS.537.0024:
[0103,0000,0000]
You should think hard how you spend it!
HGSS.537.0025: Do you want to save some money? [0200,0000]
HGSS.537.0026:
Oh!
You have no money left to save.\f
Don’t waste your money on
frivolous things, OK?\f
I know you are sensible like me
and that I can count on you!
HGSS.537.0027:
I have saved so much.
I can’t save any more.
HGSS.537.0028:
You have so much money already.
I can’t let you have any more.
HGSS.537.0033:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Professor Elm told me that\r
he has something to give you!\f
HGSS.537.0034:
Professor Elm told me that
he has something to give you.\r
Why don’t you visit his lab?
HGSS.537.0035:
The TV is playing a movie!\f
Two boys are in a cave searching
for treasure!\f
I better get going...
HGSS.537.0037:
A squeaky-clean sink!
Mom loves having it clean.
HGSS.537.0038:
What’s in the fridge...?\f
Lots of drinking water and
sweeeet lemonade!
